text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to the student council office to
deliver some documents Symboli Rudolf asked
for, when...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Teio's trainer. If you're looking for the
president, she ought to be back shortly.
choice_data_list: I don't mind waiting around a bit.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you might as well watch our chess match! I'm
just about to whoop Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Nonsense. There is not the slightest
chance of that happening.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh! Today's the day I win!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Plus, Prez said I could run with her if I do!
choice_data_list:
Refine your strategy, then show her what you're
made of!

Refine your strategy, then show her what you're
made of!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Plus, Prez said I could run with her if I do!
choice_data_list:
Refine your strategy, then show her what you're
made of!

Refine your strategy, then show her what you're
made of!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?! At least be a little more encouraging, like, "You've got this in the bag!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ouch, didn't think my own trainer would be so
brutal!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whatever! I'm gonna win whether you believe in
me or not!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! And now your pesky little queen is outta
the picture!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You two better be watching closely! I'm sitting on
the cusp of victory here!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Are you quite sure of that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Teio, I applaud your intelligence.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, when you fall victim to your own hubris,
your concentration invariably falters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The time has come to turn the tables. I shall move
my bishop here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Whoa, whoa, whoa!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So you realize your mistake. Good. Now, I am on
track to put you in checkmate next turn. Do you
have a strategy?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... Ughhh, I give up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a classic queen sacrifice. Beautifully done, Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How unfortunate, Teio. It appears that you
snatched defeat from the jaws of victory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tokai... KO'd?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I see. You've switched "Teio" with "KO'd"
because she lost... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Prez! Don't laugh at me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, I apologize. Your trainer's wordplay was
just so brilliant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is unable to quell her chuckling,
and Tokai Teio storms out of the room in a huff.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I know just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll have you know, I've been playing chess since I
was little!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Not even my parents stood a chance against me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then let's see you prove that those victories
weren't simply your parents going easy on you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Show your trainer that you can overcome the
might of the Empress!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(I guess this was never gonna be an easy win,
huh.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Forfeiting is always an option, you know. I expect
the president will return shortly, so it'd be a good
time to wrap things up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! I won't give up!
choice_data_list:
At times like these, it's important to keep a cool
head.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right. Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(Keep it together, Teio! Think—what's her
playstyle? What tactics has she used so far?)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(She pins me down whether I steel my defenses or
mount an assault. And I can't break free 'cause
she's outmaneuvering me at every turn.)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(If I wanna win, I gotta surpass the "Empress" and
set my own pace! I'll lay a trap for her!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Well, well.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I-I did it!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To think that I would be bested. Victory is yours,
Teio.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It appears you've found yourself a worthy mentor.
I hope you remain diligent in your training.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a shame. I was hoping to witness your
bout myself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez! Look, look! I beat Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that so? Then I must keep my word.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well. My schedule is open tomorrow. Shall
we go running together, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's do it! Hehehe. You're the best, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's match with Air Groove not only
boosts her confidence, it also reminds her just
how important it is to strategize.
